mapper.insert: insert into sys_operation_log ( id, operation_id, trace_id, user_id, username, role_code, operation, request_uri, request_method, operation_status, cost_ms, operation_time ) values ( #{id}, #{operationId}, #{traceId}, #{userId}, #{username}, #{roleCode}, #{operation}, #{requestUri}, #{requestMethod}, #{operationStatus}, #{costMs}, current_timestamp )
